【斩神】+【同人搞笑】+【金手指火子哥】（别带脑子进来看就完事！好不好看不知道，但肯定够癫够搞笑，对原著的一些设定略有魔改，请勿较真）
　　陈立穿越到斩神世界苦苦等了十八年，终于等来了系统，而且主角林七夜就在隔壁班。
　　可好不容易等来系统，可以选择一个小说主角抽取他们的能力，但不出意外的话是要出意外了。
　　陈立本来要选择绑定陈平安，结果在好兄弟李中华的神助攻下选择了火子哥为绑定主角，开局就获得大千录！
　　陈立看着手上的猩红竹简顿时陷入了沉思。
　　艹！
　　绑定火子哥？不让我好过，那就都别玩了！
　　春风随我作狮子鸣？苍蜣登阶！
　　林七夜看着掏心掏肺的陈立，惊恐道：“哥，冷静点，我才睁眼呢！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ec8970e246b6a0d79ec871fd8624f915","author":"凡河","author_id":"","book_id":"7435356368556543000","book_name":"斩神：我在斩神世界苍蜣登阶！","book_short_name":"我不是火子哥","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7435356397379797528","read_count":"35224","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"991174"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"465","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,搞笑轻松,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f94a7b081841a65e22b3fd58940cdbed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441308&x-signature=HK5wBF2B7XbECnLsUqGEvi2FPKE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4053278976640987","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323171508F0EEB2A4A62812D6E078"}
